creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 238005
Add vale to the docproj port

After the introduction of vale through https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=2f326706331e23173f726dc3555cb74c9d23696d it is necessary to introduce the tools for the developers. The developers needs to install it. Hence add it in the meta-port so that we can update the documentation to help the users use it.
